op.text: [as of 2025-09-06] Enrolled in twelve-week Saturday intensive ceramics class (wheel throwing) at studio in Southeast Portland; three hours every Saturday morning; started first Saturday of September 2025; separate from Tuesday night pottery class with Priya

2025-09-06: On the ceramics intensive: 'I've been circling it since the boat, honestly. The barn work, the sanding, the caulking — I noticed that the hours I spent with my hands on the Dorothy Jean were the only hours all spring where my brain went quiet. Really quiet. And when the boat launched I felt this little panic of "okay, but now what do I do with my hands." So: clay.' Said 'that class is the first thing in months that felt like me. Not like a thing I'm supposed to want, or a box I'm checking. Like me. Three hours where nobody needs an escalation decision and the clay does not care that I'm a product manager. It was the loudest my own head has been quiet since Beacon Rock.' (2025-09-06)
[as of 2025-09-06] Production incident at work following interoperability platform launch closed; work described as still 'a grind' but incident phase resolved
[as of 2025-09-06] Jogging increased to forty-five minutes; ankle recovery complete; running regularly
